name: report_employee_absence
description: Process an employee's absence for a scheduled shift, classifying it with an earning code and updating the schedule.

requiredFields.name: employee_id
requiredFields.label: Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier for the employee reporting the absence.

requiredFields.name: absence_date
requiredFields.label: Absence Date
requiredFields.description: The date of the scheduled shift the employee is absent for.

requiredFields.name: shift_start_time
requiredFields.label: Shift Start Time (HH:MM)
requiredFields.description: The exact start time of the shift being called in for (e.g., 08:00 or 15:30).

requiredFields.name: earning_code
requiredFields.label: Earning Code for Absence
requiredFields.description: The type of absence classification for payroll and accrual purposes.

requiredFields.name: notes
requiredFields.label: Additional Notes
requiredFields.description: Any additional comments or details regarding the absence.

confirmationMessage: You are about to report an absence for employee {employee_id} on {absence_date} for the shift starting at {shift_start_time}, classified as {earning_code}. This will deduct from accruals if applicable, convert the shift to an open shift, and record for payroll. Do you wish to proceed?
successMessage: Successfully reported absence for employee {employee_id} on {absence_date} and updated the schedule. The shift is now open for coverage.

name: view_employee_accrual_balances
description: Retrieve the current accrual balances for a specific employee across all accrual types.

requiredFields.name: employee_id
requiredFields.label: Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier for the employee whose accrual balances are to be retrieved.

confirmationMessage: You are about to retrieve the current accrual balances for employee {employee_id}.
successMessage: Successfully retrieved accrual balances for employee {employee_id}.

name: update_absence_earning_code
description: Modify the earning code for a previously reported employee absence.

requiredFields.name: employee_id
requiredFields.label: Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier for the employee whose absence record needs updating.

requiredFields.name: absence_date
requiredFields.label: Absence Date
requiredFields.description: The date of the absence record to update.

requiredFields.name: shift_start_time
requiredFields.label: Shift Start Time (HH:MM)
requiredFields.description: The start time of the specific shift for which the absence was reported (e.g., 08:00).

requiredFields.name: new_earning_code
requiredFields.label: New Earning Code
requiredFields.description: The new earning code to apply to the absence record.

confirmationMessage: You are about to update the earning code for employee {employee_id}'s absence on {absence_date} at {shift_start_time} to {new_earning_code}. This may adjust associated accrual balances. Do you wish to proceed?
successMessage: Successfully updated the earning code for employee {employee_id}'s absence on {absence_date}.

name: assign_coverage_to_open_shift
description: Assign a specific employee to an existing open shift to provide coverage.

requiredFields.name: open_shift_date
requiredFields.label: Open Shift Date
requiredFields.description: The date of the open shift that needs coverage.

requiredFields.name: open_shift_start_time
requiredFields.label: Open Shift Start Time (HH:MM)
requiredFields.description: The start time of the open shift (e.g., 08:00).

requiredFields.name: assignee_employee_id
requiredFields.label: Assignee Employee ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier for the employee who will cover the open shift.

confirmationMessage: You are about to assign employee {assignee_employee_id} to cover the open shift on {open_shift_date} starting at {open_shift_start_time}. This will update the schedule. Do you wish to proceed?
successMessage: Successfully assigned employee {assignee_employee_id} to the open shift on {open_shift_date}.
